overall.description: Cinematic third-person gameplay from Black Myth: Wukong showing the Monkey King character in golden armor standing within an ancient, dimly lit cavernous temple. The character slowly rotates to survey the ornate stone surroundings illuminated by warm torchlight.

scene_state.functional_zone: ancient cavernous temple hall with ornate stone pillars and Buddha shrines

agents.ego_description: standing still while slowly rotating to survey the grand temple interior, holding the staff in a ready position

entered.detail: massive cylindrical stone pillar with intricate carvings and flaming torch mounts
tall stone pillar with detailed relief carvings rising to the ceiling
tall stone pillar with detailed relief carvings and warm lighting
large seated Buddha statue within an ornate arched niche behind the central pillar
rocky ceiling with hanging stalactites and carved architectural details
intricate stone lattice work surrounding the shrine areas
smooth reflective stone floor with subtle geometric patterns

segments.scene_description: The Monkey King stands in the center of a vast, dimly lit temple hall, slowly rotating to take in the surroundings. Massive ornate stone pillars rise on all sides, each adorned with intricate carvings and flaming torches that cast warm orange light. Behind the pillars, large Buddha statues sit in elaborate niches, while stalactites hang from the rocky ceiling above the reflective marble floor.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera rotation that reveals the immense scale and ornate detail of a dimly lit ancient temple. It begins centered on the Monkey King, who slowly turns to survey a vast hall where massive stone pillars rise toward a rocky ceiling draped in stalactites. As the perspective shifts, the warm orange glow of flaming torches illuminates intricate carvings on the pillars and reflects off the polished marble floor. The scene then expands to reveal large Buddha statues resting in elaborate niches tucked behind the columns, completing the panoramic view of the cavernous sanctuary.
